title: Session ID not found in Simple Memory node
symptom: The workflow fails with 'Error in sub-node: Simple Memory' and 'No session ID found' when trying to log chat sessions.
root_cause: The error occurs because the Simple Memory node requires a session ID to function properly. If the session ID is not being passed from the previous node, the Simple Memory node cannot store or retrieve the necessary data, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the previous node in the workflow is correctly outputting a session ID.
Check the connections between nodes to confirm that the session ID is being passed to the Simple Memory node.
agent_instruction: Verify that the session ID is being correctly passed to the Simple Memory node from the previous node.
